purpose: Declare structural contracts and governed exceptions for data/bible so ordinary book corruption, partial source sequences, liturgical collection schemas, and consolidated psalter schemas are not conflated.

ordinaryBookContract.sequenceRule: ordinary numeric chapter sequences must be contiguous unless explicitly listed as governed partial/source-excerpt sequence

data/bible/ET/bookofjubileesET.json.sourceCompletenessNote: This classification prevents the structural audit from treating the preserved non-contiguous sequence as ordinary-book corruption. It does not certify text completeness or authorize fabricated gap filling.

data/bible/ET/clementstatutesET.json.sourceCompletenessNote: This classification prevents the structural audit from treating the preserved non-contiguous sequence as ordinary-book corruption. It does not certify text completeness or authorize fabricated gap filling.

data/bible/ET/fethanagastET.json.sourceCompletenessNote: This classification prevents the structural audit from treating the preserved non-contiguous sequence as ordinary-book corruption. It does not certify text completeness or authorize fabricated gap filling.

data/bible/ET/ClementBookofRollsET.json.sourceCompletenessNote: This classification prevents the structural audit from treating the preserved non-contiguous sequence as ordinary-book corruption. It does not certify text completeness or authorize fabricated gap filling.

data/bible/ET/josipponET.json.note: Collection-shaped Ethiopic historical text; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/malke’aguba’eET.json.note: Ethiopic hymnody/stanza schema; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/malke’aiyasusET.json.note: Ethiopic hymnody/stanza schema; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/malke’avirginmaryET.json.note: Ethiopic hymnody/stanza schema; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/mazahetaET.json.note: Ethiopic liturgical hymn/prayer section schema; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/miraclesofmaryET.json.note: Ethiopic Miracles of Mary narrative collection schema; not an ordinary chapter/verse biblical book file.

data/bible/ET/ClementBookofRollsET.reason: Valid JSON corpus file had no .json extension.

data/bible/NT/2baruchCE.reason: Valid JSON corpus file had no .json extension.

notes: Rotherham import remains blocked until ordinary Bible structure is governed and multi-translation schema is defined.
ET partial/excerpt classifications are not source-completeness approvals.
This governance separates schema-shape validity from future source-acquisition and text-completeness work.
